title: Jatiya Nagorik Committee: A new dawn for Bangladesh?
blurb: Long-form investigation into the rise of a new political formation and its implications for Bangladesh's post-authoritarian transition.

title: The job verification trap
blurb: OSINT investigation exposing how informal verification rackets exploit young Bangladeshi jobseekers.

title: Campus Cold War: Chhatra Dal vs. Shibir
blurb: Ground-level reporting on the ideological battle reshaping Bangladeshi universities after the July uprising.

title: Hindu nationalist mob storms Bangladesh mission in India amid escalating tension
blurb: Breaking-news investigation using cross-source verification of India-Bangladesh diplomatic flashpoint.

title: The truce that never came: Why Israel keeps sabotaging peace despite negotiations
blurb: Panorama analysis tracing the structural reasons each round of Israel–Palestine diplomacy collapses.

title: Bodies, waste, and the weight of a nation
blurb: Splash feature on public sanitation, dignity, and urban policy failure in Dhaka.

title: When salt wins against agricultural innovation
blurb: Climate-and-agriculture reporting from Bangladesh's coastal belt, where salinity is outpacing policy response.

title: Tinder Swindler: A captivating cautionary tale
blurb: Early feature on digital deception and the psychology of online trust — a theme that would later define the research trajectory.

title: How to make your CV stand out
blurb: Pursuit column piece; one of the most-shared career features in the author's TBS archive.

title: What does it take to get into MIT?
blurb: Deep-dive profile of Bangladeshi MIT admits — part of a longer body of work on education and access.
